title: T-081 — risks CRUD + lifecycle Server Actions (Open/Mitigated/Closed/Reopen) (NPD-i)
prompt:
# T-081 — Risk CRUD + lifecycle

PRD: 01-NPD-PRD.md §18
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Server Actions for risks CRUD + lifecycle transitions (Open → Mitigated → Closed + reopen) with audit + reason ≥10 chars on transition.

## Implementation contract
1. apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/[productCode]/risks/_actions/create-risk.ts: RBAC risk.write; inserts risks row; emits 'risk.created' outbox.
2. apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/[productCode]/risks/_actions/update-risk.ts: RBAC risk.write; updates fields; transitions allowed Open→Mitigated, Mitigated→Closed, Closed→Open (reopen), each requires reason ≥10 chars; writes audit_events.
3. apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/[productCode]/risks/_actions/list-risks.ts: returns risks per product_code with bucket counts.
4. Vitest covers reason length, transition validity, RBAC, audit emission.

## Files
- apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/[productCode]/risks/_actions/create-risk.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/[productCode]/risks/_actions/update-risk.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/[productCode]/risks/_actions/list-risks.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/[productCode]/risks/_actions/__tests__/risk-actions.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given a risks row in state Open, when updateRisk transitions to Mitigated with reason='ok' (len<10), then it rejects with REASON_TOO_SHORT per §18 reason contract
2. Given a non-NPD-Manager calls createRisk, when the action runs, then it rejects with FORBIDDEN per §18 RBAC risk.write
3. Given an updateRisk transitions Open→Closed (skipping Mitigated), when the action runs, then it rejects with INVALID_TRANSITION per §18 lifecycle Open → Mitigated → Closed

## Test strategy
- RED: __tests__/risk-actions.test.ts (reason length, RBAC, transition validity, audit emit) before actions exist
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test risk-actions'

## Risk red lines
- Do not allow transitions other than Open↔Mitigated↔Closed (and reopen Closed→Open)
- Do not bypass audit_events emission
- Do not allow reason shorter than 10 chars on lifecycle transitions

pipeline_inputs.details: createRisk + updateRisk + listRisks. updateRisk handles state transitions and reopen. Each writes audit_events.
